eM)return new AbortController().signal}(),this.referrer=null,("GET"===this.method||"HEAD"===this.method)&&i)throw TypeError("Body not allowed for GET or HEAD requests");if(this._initBody(i),("GET"===this.method||"HEAD"===this.method)&&("no-store"===e.cache||"no-cache"===e.cache)){var o=/([?&])_=[^&]*/;o.test(this.url)?this.url=this.url.replace(o,"$1_="+new n=t.split("="),r=n.shift().replace(/\+/g," "),i=n.join("=").replace(/\+/g," ");e.append(decodeURIComponent(r),decodeURIComponent(i))}}),e}function eZ(t,e){if(!(this instanceof eZ))throw TypeError('Please use the "new" operator, this DOM object constructor cannot be called as a function.');if(e||(e={}),this.type="default",this.status=void 599].");this.ok=this.status>=200&&this.status<300,this.statusText=void 0===e.statusText?"":""+e.statusText,this.headers=new eU(this.headers),url:this.url})},eZ.error=function(){var t=new eZ(null,{status:200,statusText:""});return t.ok=!1,t.status=0,t.type="error",t};var eq=[301,302,303,307,308];eZ.redirect=function(t,e){if(-1===eq.indexOf(e))throw RangeError("Invalid status code");return new eZ(null,{status:e,headers:{location:t}})};var eJ=eM.DOMException;try{new eJ}catch(t){(eJ=function(t,e){this.message=t,this.name=e;var n=Error(t);this.stack=n.stack}).prototype=Object.create(Error.prototype),eJ.prototype.constructor=eJ}function e0(t,e){return new Promise(function(n,r){var i=new eQ(t,e);if(i.signal&&i.signal.aborted)return r(new eJ("Aborted","AbortError"));var o=new XMLHttpRequest;function s(){o.abort()}if(o.onload=function(){var 0===t.indexOf("\n")?t.substr(1,t.length):t}).forEach(function(t){var n=t.split(":"),r=n.shift().trim();if(r){var i=n.join(":").trim();try{e.append(r,i)}catch(t){console.warn("Response "+t.message)}}}),e)};0===i.url.indexOf("file://")&&(o.status<200||o.status>599)?r.status=200:r.status=o.status,r.url="responseURL"in o?o.responseURL:r.headers.get("X-Request-URL");var s="response"in failed"))},0)},o.ontimeout=function(){setTimeout(function(){r(TypeError("Network request timed out"))},0)},o.onabort=function(){setTimeout(function(){r(new eJ("Aborted","AbortError"))},0)},o.open(i.method,function(t){try{return""===t&&eM.location.href?eM.location.href:t}catch(e){return t}}(i.url),!0),"include"===i.credentials?o.withCredentials=!0:"omit"===i.credentials&&(o.withCredentials=!1),"responseType"in o&&(eR.blob?o.responseType="blob":eR.arrayBuffer&&(o.responseType="arraybuffer")),e&&"object"==typeof e.headers&&!(e.headers instanceof eU||eM.Headers&&e.headers instanceof eM.Headers)){var
